title: Bug: Wrong number of arguments error on expansion of macro with default arguments

features.name: macro with multiple default arguments
features.description: Code should include a macro definition with multiple default arguments, where arguments have default values like arg1=d1, arg2=d2

features.name: macro call with fewer arguments than defined using defaults
features.description: Code should include a macro call with fewer arguments than the macro defines, relying on default argument values
features.snippet:
`define macro2(arg1=d1, arg2=d2) $info(`"arg1 arg2`");
initial begin
  `macro2()
  `macro2(1)
end
